name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary
Brief description of the feature.

## Motivation
Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed approach
How might this be implemented?

## Does this touch any novel mechanisms?
- [ ] NOVEL-1: Hierarchical Concept Inheritance
- [ ] NOVEL-2: Cross-Agent Confidence Reinforcement
- [ ] NOVEL-3: Temporal Decay
- [ ] No — this is additive/infrastructure only

If yes, open a discussion first before submitting a PR.
